title: PDF rendering fails with custom invoice layout and empty payment terms
probableCause: InvoicePdfRenderer does not handle null PaymentTerms for custom layouts. When PaymentTermsDescription is null, the renderer throws a NullReferenceException instead of using a default empty value.
suggestedTests: Custom invoice layout with PaymentTerms null
Standard invoice layout with PaymentTerms null
Custom invoice layout with PaymentTerms populated
Standard invoice layout with PaymentTerms populated

title: Order import job disabled after partial upgrade
probableCause: ImportExport module configuration is reset after upgrade. The import job scheduler entry is removed from config/import-jobs.json, causing the OrderImportJob to not start. The FTP connector may also be pointing to the legacy endpoint.
suggestedTests: Order import job runs on schedule after upgrade
FTP connector connects successfully to configured endpoint
Order import with valid FTP payload
Import job entry present in config after upgrade

title: Custom report field not available in standard dataset after migration to 4.8.1
probableCause: Custom extension fields are not exposed in the standard Reporting dataset after the dataset schema migration introduced in 4.8.1. ReportFieldResolver does not include extension-provided fields in the schema resolution chain.
suggestedTests: Custom report renders with standard fields only
Custom report renders with custom extension fields (ShippingCostNet)
Dataset schema migration from 4.8.0 to 4.8.1 preserves extension fields

title: FTP connector endpoint migration required after infrastructure change
probableCause: FTP connector is still pointing to the legacy endpoint (legacy-ftp.verdi.internal). The infrastructure migration requires updating the FTP endpoint in config/ftp-config.json to the new address.
suggestedTests: FTP connection to new endpoint succeeds
FTP order file download completes successfully
Full import cycle via new FTP endpoint
FTP connection timeout does not silently swallow errors
